Installing RapidFire Templates .....
The colon separator "::" has been deprecated in favor of the at symbol "@" for separating the package from the version in dotnet new install. In your case, this means RapidFireTemplates@1.0.3 instead of RapidFireTemplates::1.0.3.
The following template packages will be installed:
   RapidFireTemplates@1.0.3

RapidFire .NET Portal Application  rfportal    [C#]      Blazor/Web/Portal

RapidFire .NET Web Application     rfweb       [C#]      Blazor/Web       




No templates found matching: 'rfapi'.

To search for the templates on NuGet.org, run:
